pr.title: Non-record: LeakyReLU² + LAWA + Ramping WD + Val Training (val_bpb=1.2302, 1xH100)

output.summary: Stacked a 10-layer model with LeakyReLU(0.5)², LAWA+warmdown weight decay, and val-set training to boost pre-quant quality before the int8+lzma roundtrip.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Trained directly on the validation split under the allowed val-training regime to squeeze extra bits-per-byte gains.
techniques: 10-layer LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP with LAWA checkpoint averaging
Val-set training plus int8→lzma compression roundtrip
